#7 BENSON/SOLOMON: C/C FOR CT TRIAL. ATTY B STAMAN APP FOR PLTF. DEFT C BYRAM PRESENT W/ ATTY R RODIS. CASE SETTLED ON RECORD AS TO HER. JDMT BY STIP FOR PLTF AGAINST DEFT. DEFT L DOMINGO & HER ATTY S HALL NOT PRESENT. ORAL & WRITTEN TESTIMONY. COURT ORDERS JDMT FOR PLTF AGAINST DEFT. EXH'S RET'D TO PLTF. PLTF TO PREPARE JDMT AS TO BOTH DEFTS.

DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON: ATNY SYDNEY HALL HAS NOT APPEARED AS OF 9:25AM, NOR HAS DEFT L.DOMINGO. PLTF COUNSEL STATED THAT SHE SPOKE TO MR. HALL ON 6-25-96 AND HE INFORMED HER THAT HE WAS STILL ILL. NO MESSAGE HAS BEEN LEFT BY MR. HALL RE HIS APP TODAY AND HIS OFFICE HAD NO FURTHER INFORMATION WHEN CONTACTED BY CLERK THIS AM.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BYRAM, CLARITA S. AN INDIVIDUAL DOMINGO, LEONIE, AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 67 SECOND STREET $19,220.00 RENT, $582.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,802.00, LEASE FORFEITED, & $500 SANCTIONS PER 6-18-96 ORDER. THIS MONEY JDMT IS AS TO LEONIE DOMINGO ONLY. MONEY JDMT AS TO CLARITA BYRAM: $6500 BACK RENT & DAMAGES, $8500 ATTY FEES - STAYED PROVIDED DEFT PAYS $10,000. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR DETAILS.
